items.title: Guthrie family renews appeal for help to bring missing mother home
items.dek: A seven-week nationwide search for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of TV anchor Savannah Guthrie has not identified any suspects.
items.body: A seven-week nationwide search for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of TV anchor Savannah Guthrie has not identified any suspects.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'A direct hit' - BBC visits Israeli town after Iranian strike
items.dek: The BBC's Sebastian Usher reports from Dimona in southern Israel, which was hit by an Iranian missile.
items.body: The BBC's Sebastian Usher reports from Dimona in southern Israel, which was hit by an Iranian missile.
